channel.title: Kobo Blog
channel.description: On the Rakuten Kobo blog discover new eBooks and audiobooks, read interviews with authors, get book recommendations, and celebrate the love of reading.

item.title: Rink-melting hockey romances for fans of Heated Rivalry
item.description: Hockey is everywhere in contemporary romance, from college-set new adult, NHL superstars, beer league knockabouts, and everything in between.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: Why Rainbow Rowell's Cherry Baby had to be her sexiest book yet
item.description: Nathan Maharaj spoke with Rainbow Rowell about her book Cherry Baby. It’s about Cherry, a woman figuring out what comes after the end of her marriage.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: 61 new books coming out April 14 – 20, 2026
item.description: Lena Dunham has more to tell, Middle Age self-help, perspectives from moms, and the story of a forgotten book that brought its readership to climax.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: Horror manga so good it's scary!
item.description: Featuring manga series ranging from emotional horror to some truly gruesome stories, including works by Junji Ito, Q Hayashida, and Hideo Yamamoto
item.author: jessie.ho@rakuten.com (Jessie Ho)

item.title: The best eReader for people who think they don't like eReaders
item.description: If you're an avid reader who thinks you'll never find a use for an eReader—think again.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: Audiobooks as good as your favourite podcasts
item.description: Check out these pairings of audiobooks and podcasts and get some ideas of what to listen to between seasons of your favourite shows.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: Smouldering Romantasy reads for fans of Blood and Ash
item.description: For fans of Jennifer L. Armentrout's Blood & Ash series, here's a firepit full of flaming-hot Romantasy series you can start reading today.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: Tara Gereaux on finding the words for an unspoken identity
item.description: Nathan Maharaj spoke with Tara Gereaux, author of Wild People Quiet. It's a story about a solitary woman living in a fictional Saskatchewan town in 1946.
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: 105 new books coming out March 30 – April 13, 2026
item.description: It's a double-dose of spring books including the latest from Tana French, James Patterson, Captain Underpants with a whole new look and so much more!
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)

item.title: What’s new with Kobo – Spring 2026 update
item.description: Our first update of 2026 includes a friendlier home screen on Kobo’s iOS app, a stronger grip on Kobo Remote, and streamlined Web Reader feedback
item.author: nathan.maharaj@rakuten.com (Nathan Maharaj)
